notes: All values trace to financial-model.md, value-bench.md, and assumptions_register.json. Status annotations: [FACT], [INFERENCE], [ASSUMPTION].

revenue_streams.name: Bronze subscription
revenue_streams.trigger: Shop upgrades from free claimed tier to Bronze
revenue_streams.note: Primary revenue stream at V2 launch. Net of Stripe fees: ~£19.12/shop/month. Status: [FACT — intake.md pricing decision]

revenue_streams.name: Silver subscription
revenue_streams.trigger: Bronze shop upgrades to Silver (requires 20+ ordering waitlist sign-ups or 6+ months on Bronze)

revenue_streams.name: Silver commission on GMV
revenue_streams.note: Commission applies to the full basket value when basket ≥ £20. Average GMV £800/month early phase [ASSUMPTION], £1,200 by Year 3 [ASSUMPTION]. Status: [FACT — intake.md; ASSUMPTION — GMV level]

revenue_streams.name: Gold subscription
revenue_streams.trigger: Silver shop upgrades to Gold (requires 3+ months on Silver + 50+ completed orders)

revenue_streams.name: Gold commission on GMV
revenue_streams.note: 5% commission becomes a retention risk above £8,000/month GMV per shop (viability-gate condition gold-commission-cap). Commission cap design required before V3 launch. Status: [FACT — intake.md; ASSUMPTION — GMV level]

revenue_streams.name: Campaign add-ons (Bronze tier)
revenue_streams.trigger: Shop purchases a newsletter feature or social post campaign
revenue_streams.note: Done-for-you output. Modelled at 2 campaigns/Bronze shop/year. Status: [FACT — intake.md; ASSUMPTION — frequency]

customer_acquisition.notes: All conversion rates and claim rates are [ASSUMPTION]. LTV calculations are [INFERENCE] from revenue streams and churn rates.

market_to_revenue_bridge.description: Consumer traffic — 100,000 monthly visitors at Month 12
market_to_revenue_bridge.dependency: SEO content programme executed from Month 1; county guide articles, JSON-LD markup on all 953 listings

market_to_revenue_bridge.description: Claimed listings at Month 12 — 15% of 953 seeded listings
market_to_revenue_bridge.dependency: Consumer traffic reaching threshold (50+ sessions/month on a listing) triggers traffic-triggered email outreach

market_to_revenue_bridge.description: Bronze subscribers at Month 12 — 6% of claimed listings (base case)
market_to_revenue_bridge.dependency: Analytics dashboard demonstrates traffic evidence; 90-day trial for first 50 subscribers reduces conversion barrier

market_to_revenue_bridge.description: Bronze subscribers at Month 36 (Year 3 end) — base case
market_to_revenue_bridge.dependency: Claim rate reaching 50% of 953 seed listings; Bronze conversion progressing to 12% of claimed by Year 3
45 avg Bronze × £20 × 12 + 25 avg Silver × £60 × 12 + Silver commission + 5 avg Gold × £100 × 12 + Gold commission + campaign add-ons

cost_of_sales.net_silver_commission_example: On £1,000 GMV: 3% commission = £30; Stripe 0.25% payout = £2.50; net = £27.50

year_1.notes: Supabase and Vercel on free tiers through Year 1. Legal budget covers ToS, privacy policy, yourhonestybox.com agreement, FRA partnership review. [ASSUMPTION]

year_2.notes: Infrastructure costs activate from Q3 Year 2. Content/moderation contractor from Month 20. Marketing budget covers FRA show, county content programme. [ASSUMPTION]

year_3.notes: Agricultural show (Royal Highland, Royal Bath & West, or county show TBD). FRA show stand. Full SEO content programme. [ASSUMPTION]

founder_year1.note: No salary taken from business in Year 1; personal capital covers living costs [ASSUMPTION]

founder_year2.role: Solo founder — all functions including product
founder_year2.note: Primary driver of Year 2 EBITDA deficit. Deferral to Year 3 reduces Year 2 deficit to ~£12,928 [ASSUMPTION]

first_hire_month20.note: 2 days per week; handles moderation queue and content production. Funded from Bronze revenue at ~30+ subscribers. De-risks solo founder incapacity risk (ER-01). [ASSUMPTION]

founder_year3.role: Founder — commercial development and portfolio strategy

funding_requirement.year1_closing_balance_note: Tight but manageable if content and legal spend is staged correctly. Year 1 spend plan: ~£500 Month 1; ~£600 Months 2–4; ~£2,000 Months 5–8; ~£1,900 Months 9–12.

innovate_uk_option.recommendation: Submit as parallel track, not dependency. If successful, deployed in Year 2 to accelerate content programme and partially fund founder salary. Break-even advances from Month 42–48 to ~Month 36 with £25k grant.

angel_seed_option.recommended_trigger: Bronze conversion confirmed at 3% downside by Month 9, OR outperforming plan (8%+ conversion, 80k+ traffic) and accelerating portfolio engine
angel_seed_option.recommendation: Defer angel seed consideration until Month 9 review or 50+ Bronze subscribers. Do not raise pre-launch — product is more fundable post-launch with traffic data than pre-launch with projections.

funding_requirement.break_even_note: Break-even defined as all operating costs covered including founder salary. At Month 36 end, monthly revenue ~£5,008 vs monthly operating cost run rate ~£7,500.

downside_case.trigger_action: Angel seed round evaluation at Month 9 if confirmed in downside case

upside_case.trigger_action: Evaluate angel seed to accelerate portfolio engine investment; TractorMap launch potentially Month 18 instead of Month 24
